name: Crunchy Almond Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 15 ounce pkg. Pillsbury All Ready Pie Crusts
1/3 cup unsalted butter or margarine, softened
1 large apple, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the pie crust according to package directions for a filled one-crust pie using a 9-inch pie pan. Refrigerate any remaining crust.
3. Spread apricot preserves over the bottom of the prepared pie crust in the pan.
4. In a small bowl, beat together 3/4 cup sugar and softened butter until light and fluffy. Add 1 egg, 1 egg yolk, and 1 tablespoon flour; blend well. Stir in 3/4 cup ground almonds and raisins.
5. Spread the almond mixture over the preserves.
6. Arrange apple slices over the almond mixture.
7. To prepare topping, beat together the reserved egg whites until foamy. Add 1/3 cup sugar and continue beating until soft peaks form. Gently fold in 1 cup sliced almonds; spread over the apples.
8. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes or until the top is crisp and golden brown. Let cool for 15 minutes before serving. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
9. Serves 8
10. Per serving: 470 calories, 6 g protein, 51 g carbohydrate, 27 g fat, 90 mg cholesterol, 180 mg sodium
